programme.title: À l'affiche
programme.desc: Comment les cinéastes, les romanciers, les artistes racontent-ils le monde ? France 24 part à la rencontre d'une culture engagée dans son temps.

programme.title: E22 - It's Time For A Canal Walk
programme.desc: JoJo and Gran Gran are enjoying a canal walk when they meet Ned and Monty, who need some help - Ned has lost the lock key, causing a canal traffic jam. It's time for a Gran Gran plan.

programme.title: E22 - Whale Watching
programme.desc: Bluey promises her customer, Bingo, the best tour ever in a game of Whale Watching, but they need Mum and Dad to join in, and they are too tired to play after a late night.

programme.title: E23 - Family Meeting
programme.desc: When Dad's accused of fluffing in Bluey's face as he climbed out of bed, he's put on trial with Mum as the judge, and Bluey and Bingo as witnesses. Bluey might also have to explain what she was doing there.

programme.title: E16 - Artichoke
programme.desc: Little artichoke sings about being the rhyming queen.

programme.title: E25 - Not So Supertato
programme.desc: Evil Pea tricks Supertato into believing he has no superpowers without his red cape. When he rescues his friends without his cape he discovers he has superpowers cape or no cape!

programme.title: E68 - Spinning
programme.desc: The Teletubbies travel by Tubby Car to the Hidey Hup where they all spin around on the Tubby Spinny.

programme.title: E18 - Messy Cake-Off
programme.desc: It's the Great OKIDO Cake-Off! In his enthusiasm, Messy accidentally ruins everyone's cakes. Will he be able to follow the recipe and bake a cake in time for Gloria's eightieth birthday party?

programme.title: E26 - Fairy Tale
programme.desc: Dad tells Bluey and Bingo a real-life fairy tale about growing up in a wild place called the '80s, about a boy who was cursed when he was mean to his little brother.

programme.title: E25 - Ragdoll
programme.desc: Dad agrees to take Bluey and Bingo to the shops to buy an ice-cream if they can get him into the car. Only problem is... he's just entered 'Ragdoll' mode!

programme.title: E13 - The Good Choices
programme.desc: The Squirrels haven't been making good choices round the messy clubhouse. With Duggee's help, they start to get it right. But not before sending Roly's imagination into overdrive!

programme.title: E12 - Andy And The Caimans
programme.desc: Andy embarks on an adventure to Bolivia in South America in search of a caiman eggshell.

programme.title: E40 - The Imagination Badge
programme.desc: When the Squirrels tell Duggee that they have nothing left to play with, he encourages them to use their imagination.

programme.title: E39 - The Recipe Badge
programme.desc: The hungry Squirrels turn to Duggee when they aren't sure what to eat. Fortunately, he has his cookbook The Clubhouse Kitchen: Tasty Bites for Hungry Squirrels.

programme.title: E10 - Go Jet Academy: Hailstorm
programme.desc: Can the Go Jetters brand new click-on save the GoJet Academy from a glitched thunderstorm?

programme.title: E18 - Nia's Bright Idea
programme.desc: Nia uses what she learns about lighthouses to suggest covering a big wheel in Christmas lights, so that Harold can see where he's going in a storm.

programme.title: E37 - Haber Dasher
programme.desc: When the zip on Sarah's hoodie breaks, Scarf Lady suggests a trip to the haberdasher.

programme.title: E39 - Snowball Skate
programme.desc: Sarah and Duck explore a Winter Fair in the park, and discover an amazing skating rink inside a giant snowball!

programme.title: E12 - Shop
programme.desc: Stanley covers Jose at the shop and ends up making too much popcorn. So as not to waste it all, Stanley and his friends put on a film night to screen Little Woo's film.

programme.title: E11 - Postie Puzzle
programme.desc: Jayden wants Papa's envelopes for his drawings, so he can deliver them like a postie. He counts on his hands that he needs six of them.

programme.title: E22 - It's Time For A Canal Walk
programme.desc: JoJo and Gran Gran are enjoying a canal walk when they meet Ned and Monty, who need some help - Ned has lost the lock key, causing a canal traffic jam. It's time for a Gran Gran plan.

programme.title: E22 - Whale Watching
programme.desc: Bluey promises her customer, Bingo, the best tour ever in a game of Whale Watching, but they need Mum and Dad to join in, and they are too tired to play after a late night.

programme.title: E23 - Family Meeting
programme.desc: When Dad's accused of fluffing in Bluey's face as he climbed out of bed, he's put on trial with Mum as the judge, and Bluey and Bingo as witnesses. Bluey might also have to explain what she was doing there.

programme.title: E16 - Artichoke
programme.desc: Little artichoke sings about being the rhyming queen.

programme.title: E25 - Not So Supertato
programme.desc: Evil Pea tricks Supertato into believing he has no superpowers without his red cape. When he rescues his friends without his cape he discovers he has superpowers cape or no cape!

programme.title: E68 - Spinning
programme.desc: The Teletubbies travel by Tubby Car to the Hidey Hup where they all spin around on the Tubby Spinny.

programme.title: E18 - Messy Cake-Off
programme.desc: It's the Great OKIDO Cake-Off! In his enthusiasm, Messy accidentally ruins everyone's cakes. Will he be able to follow the recipe and bake a cake in time for Gloria's eightieth birthday party?

programme.title: E26 - Fairy Tale
programme.desc: Dad tells Bluey and Bingo a real-life fairy tale about growing up in a wild place called the '80s, about a boy who was cursed when he was mean to his little brother.

programme.desc: Dad agrees to take Bluey and Bingo to the shops to buy an ice-cream if they can get him into the car. Only problem is... he's just entered 'Ragdoll' mode!

programme.title: How To Build Homes That Better Survive Disasters?
programme.desc: After hurricanes, floods, or wildfires, we often see 'miracle houses” - standing strong while others break. What's the secret behind their survival? We look at different types of buildings for these types of extreme weather events.

programme.title: Searching For Clues - Donations For Islamist Terrorism?
programme.desc: Islamist terrorism continues to claim numerous victims worldwide. Extremist networks are financed in part by donations from Germany. But investigations often prove to be difficult.

programme.title: The Worldwide Materials Transition
programme.desc: From Venezuela's extra heavy crude oil to Trump's focus on Greenland's rare earths to Germany's F60 steel giants and illegal gold mines in Indonesia: How raw materials impact landscapes, people, and politics.

programme.title: Mumbai Fishers Battle Climate Change And Modernization
programme.desc: In Mumbai, climate change is eroding trust among the Koli fishing community. Plus: In Cambodia, rising heat and flooding disrupt children's education.

programme.title: Svalbard: Russia's Arctic 'Trump Card' Against Nato
programme.desc: The remote island group of Svalbard - it is NATO territory but a hundred-year-old treaty grants access to dozens of countries - including Russia. And Russia is using it to build up a strategic foothold in the Arctic.

programme.title: E12
programme.desc: Chef Chen Zong-sheng demonstrates his delightfully deceptive dish: Carp-Shaped Giant Fried Prawns. As carp signifies fortune and prosperity, this dish is often served at weddings and celebrations.

programme.title: E9 - Flavor Pioneers
programme.desc: Buddy visits two culinary powerhouses who are bringing the flavors of their native countries to the places they now call home. First, he's off to Natraliart, serving up a taste of Jamaican paradise.

programme.title: E9 - Flavor Pioneers
programme.desc: Buddy visits two culinary powerhouses who are bringing the flavors of their native countries to the places they now call home. First, he's off to Natraliart, serving up a taste of Jamaican paradise.

programme.title: E9 - Flavor Pioneers

programme.title: E12
programme.desc: Chef Chen Zong-sheng demonstrates his delightfully deceptive dish: Carp-Shaped Giant Fried Prawns. As carp signifies fortune and prosperity, this dish is often served at weddings and celebrations.

programme.title: E6 - Jaw Dropper
programme.desc: Dr. Lyndsey joins Dr. Lee to help David, who is fearful that the lump on his jaw might be cancerous. Carla has a mysterious, large bulge on her thigh that concerns Dr. Lee.

programme.title: E222 - Krabby Patty Creature Feature / Teacher's Pests
programme.desc: A new secret Krabby Patty formula has disastrous results for Bikini Bottom, and only SpongeBob can save the day. // Mr. Krabs and Plankton have to take boating school classes. Thankfully, SpongeBob's there to show them the ropes!

programme.title: E103 - Dance Off / The show must go on
programme.desc: Jade's a great dancer which results in her facing Mr Best for dance off in person. // Mica and Jade put on a play to win their school a prize, but forget a key prop so the Marsups step in to help.

programme.title: E122 - Dance, Dance Resolution / A Fair to Remember
programme.desc: It’s the Sadie Hawkins dance at school and Lincoln’s sisters have accidentally landed him four dates! // When Lincoln and Bobby become friends, Lori sets out to make Bobby jealous by hanging out with Clyde.

programme.title: E209 - Summer Chuseok / Putting Up with the Plovers
programme.desc: In an attempt to get out of the dentist, Lily insists on a summer celebration of the fall holiday Chuseok. // When Will accidentally befriends an annoying man, his sorry attempts at a break-up make things painfully awkward for the whole family.

programme.title: E324 - SpongeBob and Patrick's Timeline Twist-Up Part 2
programme.desc: When Patrick's Time Closet goes on the fritz, SpongeBob's history is re-written by time traveling interlopers.

programme.title: E103 - Dance Off / The show must go on
programme.desc: Jade's a great dancer which results in her facing Mr Best for dance off in person. // Mica and Jade put on a play to win their school a prize, but forget a key prop so the Marsups step in to help.

programme.title: E110 - The Meatball of Canyon Valley / Sticky Fingers
programme.desc: When Halmoni chooses Jack over Lil to be her Trot dance competition partner, jealous Lil seeks revenge. / Min asks Jack to run a simple errand, but Charlie the gibbon intervenes, sending Jack and Lil chasing after him into the town's abandoned mines.

programme.title: E121 - The Patrick Show Sells Out / Neptune's Ball
programme.desc: The Patrick Show gets competing sponsors. // The star family visits King Neptune's palace.

programme.title: E114 - Chess-a-pult / Smart & Smarter
programme.desc: Best and Bester turn themselves into chess pieces but have to abandon their game to save the sub from flooding. // Bester and Best are tasked with neutralising the enemy agent's ransomware for the Bettervale Investigation Bureau.

programme.title: E412 - Car Trek
programme.desc: Charlotte's birthday road trip to see the Boo Man Group perform gets sidetracked by a Captain Man and Kid Danger emergency.

programme.title: E210 - The Real Woori World / The Collector
programme.desc: Min tries to avoid the usual Woori World chaos, but when the family splits up they all get lost in their own fiascos. // Jack's mission to find the rare DVD sequel of his favorite movie leads him to the mysterious Collector.

programme.title: E302 - Insta-Gran
programme.desc: Pop Pop introduces his new girlfriend to the family. She seems great until she starts showing up unannounced.

programme.title: E804 - InTODDnito / Weather Or Not
programme.desc: When Darcy's birthday party falls on the same day as one of Lisa's hero scientist's talks, Lisa sends TODD in her place to the party. // Flip sees a lucrative business opportunity when he discovers Nacho has the ability to predict the weather.

programme.title: Brgy[Live]
programme.desc: 'BRGY' is a daily talk-magazine-lifestyle show that celebrates stories about Filipinos by Filipinos. The show aims to bring home every Filipino wherever they are in the world. Sharing and conversations won't be limited to one space but it can be wherever your heart feel at ease.

programme.title: Pamilya Sagrado
programme.desc: A gripping family drama and political thriller set in the world of Freemasonry and fraternity hazing. The Sagrado family, a powerful political clan, faces moral dilemmas and scandals that threaten their reputation and unity. As secrets unravel, they must choose between protecting their name and staying true to their principles, all while navigating corruption, loyalty, and betrayal.

programme.title: E41 - It's A Dog's Cheese
programme.desc: 52 before JC. The city of Lutecia is occupied by the Romans... Completely? No! A gang of invincible animals led by Idefix resist the invader again and again and its plans to romanise the city.

programme.title: E11 - Life In The Wild
programme.desc: Yann and his little sister Marina live with their uncle Patrick, a famous oceanographer, on a Polynesian atoll. The two children meet Oum, a mysterious white dolphin who's always keen to help those he likes. Their friendship sees them exploring the ocean depths together.

programme.title: E21 - A. My Bot-y Guard/Little Quacker and Mister Fuzzy Hide/Pipeline/No Brain, No Gain/Cat
programme.desc: Dr. Bigby upgrades Bot to a Bot-y Guard. When Tom sets off Bot's defensive systems, things get out of control and Jerry and Napoleon must disarm Bot without hurting him.

programme.title: E338 - Earthquake-Proof Bear/The Spirit Of Competition/Odd-Job Crab/Ordeal Of Comfort/Outboa
programme.desc: The Lemmings discover that several drops of Tabasco sauce poured into a rock fault releases powerful sprays of steam that propel them high into the sky on a pot lid.

programme.title: E40 - On the Run/Horror Club/Maximum Capacity
programme.desc: Steven and Amethyst try out life on the road.

programme.title: E111 - Painbow/Secret Swapper of Doom/Little Octi Lost/Snow Month/Arachno-Romance
programme.desc: When a mysterious rainbow causes everyone to become unnaturally happy, the Powerpuff Girls must find where it ends to save the day and return Townsville to normal.

programme.title: E145 - A Running Battle/Egg & Bean/Hopping Mad!/A Grand Invitation/A Royal Make-Over
programme.desc: It's the start of a Fun Run. Mr. Bean lines-up beside his deadly enemy: the fat bloke who stole his parking space. Fun Run or no, nothing will stop Bean beating this man to the finishing post, even if he has to flag a cab.

programme.title: E6
programme.desc: 劇情講述一個少女的失蹤交織著無數的謊言和慾望，牽涉其中的七個人遭遇重大事件後發生的故事。這七個人都會為了個人私慾背叛，出賣他人，過著充滿謊言的生活。​

programme.title: E9
programme.desc: 講述在司法不公不義的社會中，地下秘密的士公司「彩虹運輸」存在著一位特殊部隊出身的代表的士司機替一群無法受到法律保護的被害者們找回公理。

programme.desc: The rainy season begins and the problems escalate. The team must devise new strategies to safeguard the equipment and prevent it from being washed away by the daily thunderstorms.

programme.title: E13 - Food
programme.desc: In this food-filled episode, Catfish throws up all over the world. The biking duo try various forms of genitalia including bull testicle, tiger and sea penis, virgin eggs, otherwise known as pee billed eggs, and more. They try duck head in China and worm tequila and mosquito eggs in Mexico. The question becomes, can you keep it down while watching this special episode?

programme.title: E1 - Trial by Fire
programme.desc: The Darnell’s 9-month show tour begins in Cayuga as Driver, Chris prepares rookie, Wayner for his first show as Shockwave's solo-Crew Chief, a role that could literally be the difference between life or death for Chris.

programme.title: E2 - You Play With Fire, You Might Get Burned
programme.desc: Tensions mount in Cayuga as a frightening crash occurs on the drag strip moments before Chris is set to perform his incredibly dangerous first night race of the season alongside his still untested Crew Chief, Wayner.

programme.title: E2 - Shark Go Boom
programme.desc: In this iconic scene, Chief Brody hangs on to his sinking boat as a giant shark approaches him with a scuba tank lodged in its mouth. We construct a giant shark on a motorized platform to test if you can hit, and explode, the tank with an M1 Garand rifle while perched in a precarious position.

programme.title: E9 - Wardens Case Files
programme.desc: Wardens follow a bear of a case. Then the comical story of a decoy deer gone wrong.

E108 - Double Booked / Bogweed / Prizes
programme.desc: Tim tries to be at two parties at once. // Tim tries to find a bogweed free snack for Kai. // After losing again and again, Tia tries to win every party game.

programme.title: E402 - The Pickle Family Campout
programme.desc: When all the members of Pickle's family get lost in the woods, Pickle teams up with Tow Truck Blaze to come to their rescue!

programme.title: E1303 - Pups And The Alien Grandpa
programme.desc: Cap'n Turbot tells the tale of how he learned to speak fluent 'alien' while shipwrecked with an Alien Grandpa!

programme.title: E726 - Grandpa Pig's Greenhouse
programme.desc: Grandpa Pig and Grandpa Dog are showing and sharing their lovely, tomato filled, Greenhouses to Peppa and George.

programme.title: E110 - Double Dare You / Roy
programme.desc: On a ski trip, the Barbapapas build a giant igloo. Barbabravo and Barbalib challenge each other to find out who is braver. // Barbabright creates a vacuuming robot that's also very good at soccer. The Barbababies organise a match against the robots.

programme.title: E620 - Megabot!
programme.desc: Blaze and AJ help their amazing new friend Megabot get to Axle City in time for the big Robot Parade

programme.title: E1303 - Pups And The Alien Grandpa
programme.desc: Cap'n Turbot tells the tale of how he learned to speak fluent 'alien' while shipwrecked with an Alien Grandpa!

programme.title: E818 - The Petting Farm
programme.desc: Peppa and her friends visit Mrs Badger's petting farm where they meet lots of little animals and learn it's important to wash your hands.

programme.title: E819 - Pizza! Pizza!
programme.desc: Peppa and her family have a lot of fun preparing and choosing food to make their own pizzas. Peppa likes making pizzas!

programme.title: E316 - Danny's Pirate Party
programme.desc: It is Danny Dog's birthday, and with the help of Granddad Dog and Grandpa Pig the children take part in a pirate treasure hunt.

programme.title: E1303 - Pups And The Alien Grandpa
programme.desc: Cap'n Turbot tells the tale of how he learned to speak fluent 'alien' while shipwrecked with an Alien Grandpa!

programme.title: E209 - The Crew Builds A Farm Animal Yoga Space
programme.desc: When Farmer Zoe's animals need some relaxation, the pups build a perfect place to practice yoga with Coach Karima.

programme.desc: Peppa and her friends visit Mrs Badger's petting farm where they meet lots of little animals and learn it's important to wash your hands.

programme.title: E819 - Pizza! Pizza!
programme.desc: Peppa and her family have a lot of fun preparing and choosing food to make their own pizzas. Peppa likes making pizzas!

programme.title: E217 - Cowgirl
programme.desc: Barbalala dreams of becoming a cowgirl and Barbidou is determined to help her.

programme.title: E720 - Valentine's Day Rescue
programme.desc: It's Valentine's Day! But when Zeg, Darington and Starla get lost on their way to the Valentine's Day party, it's up to Blaze and AJ to rescue them.

programme.title: E1303 - Pups And The Alien Grandpa / Pups Save A Lemon-Loving Duckling
programme.desc: Cap'n Turbot tells the tale of how he learned to speak fluent 'alien' while shipwrecked with an Alien Grandpa! // A lemon-loving baby duckling from Yumi's Farm gets mixed up in a delivery to Lizzy's Lemonade Shoppe.

programme.title: E113 - The Perfect Dinner / The Kittens
programme.desc: Barbapapa and Barbamama go out to celebrate their birthdays. Barbabelle is in charge and gets overwhelmed. // Barbabelle watches Bali's kittens. She's scared something will happen and won't let them out. Barbamama must intervene to help the kittens.

programme.title: E115 - The Fuchsia Ocean / Zero Waste
programme.desc: Chemical sprays are making the countryside rosy! The Barbapapas' build an aviary to protect sick birds. // When they see a beach covered with rubbish, the Barbapapa family decides to clean the beach and use the trash to make a miniature golf course.

programme.title: E116 - Hiccupism / Silence Please
programme.desc: Barbabeau can't paint. He has a hiccup he can't get rid of. Just when he's about to give up, he accidentally creates a new artistic movement. // Barbalib wants to compete in a writing contest but his brothers and sisters stop her from concentrating.

programme.title: E210 - The Crew And Skye Build A Mountain Lodge

programme.desc: The Paw Patrol must rescue Mr. Porter and reunite an ostrich family before the big birds get into big trouble. // During Mayor Goodway's fashion show, the Pups must save Farmer Al and Mayor Humdinger after a puffy shirt floats away with them.

programme.title: E404 - The Missing Magical Instruments
programme.desc: Dora, Boots, and Vicky the Vicuna track down missing magic instruments to save Cloud Kingdom!

programme.desc: It is snowing, so Peppa and George go outside to play.

programme.title: E13 - 露人團收官「瘋」神
programme.desc: 潮流露營全面升級，發起人陳偉霆將帶領魏大勛、王琳凱、楊迪、尹正、張顏齊組成「露」人團，他們將邀請5組不同社交關系的飛行好友團展開社交露營，在5個夢幻營地完成5次主題露營，構建5種理想生活畫像，共赴自然美好。

programme.title: E32
programme.desc: 講述現代失意青年王衡意外穿越到西漢，結識了神似前女友的俠女得九，並與性格開朗的王爺劉賀成為摯友；他們試圖憑藉王衡的現代思維與知識，聯手改變劉賀悲劇性的命運，並在過程中共同成長、療愈彼此。

programme.title: Decision To Leave
programme.desc: Kind and polite detective Haejun is entrusted with a case of unnatural death in the mountains. While investigating the case, he meets Seorae, the dead victim's wife, and can't help but both suspect and develop an interest in her.

programme.title: Living In Two Worlds
programme.desc: Dai is born to deaf parents and has been raised with deep love in rural Japan. However, as he grows older, he becomes troubled by his differences from others and begins to blame his deaf mother for his daily frustrations. When he turns 20, Dai leaves home for Tokyo as if to escape. Life in Tokyo was lonely at first, but when Dai starts working as a magazine reporter, he finds fulfillment in meeting a diverse group of people. Time eventually passes, and Dai returns home for the first time in eight years. In spending peaceful time with his deaf mother after a long time, a memory that has been sealed away unexpectedly comes back to Dai.

programme.title: The Super Launching
programme.desc: The Super Launching is a geek program in the realm of popular science. Dedicated to showcasing new technologies, achievements, and breakthroughs from around the world, the program focuses on both highlighting existing hot topics and generating new ones, offering the audience a glimpse into the latest popular science and industry developments. Anchored in an innovative city with a global perspective, the Super Launching has established itself as the best platform for global premieres, debuts, and the launch of first stores.

programme.desc: The prospective touch the nature and human history and future, such as technology and occult in all areas. programme.title: E18
programme.desc: 《變成你的那一天》講述了頂流大明星江熠和女娛記者餘聲聲因為一次意外，身體和身份互換。兩人面對現狀只能相互指導，幫對方遮掩，因此發生了一系列逗趣搞笑的故事。

programme.title: E18
programme.desc: 《變成你的那一天》講述了頂流大明星江熠和女娛記者餘聲聲因為一次意外，身體和身份互換。兩人面對現狀只能相互指導，幫對方遮掩，因此發生了一系列逗趣搞笑的故事。

programme.title: E31
programme.desc: 消防局長宋焰（楊洋飾）和急診科醫生許沁（王楚然飾）分別十年之後重逢，青春時代的兩人因家庭反對被迫分開，再相見時，兩人都有了許多成長和改變。由於工作性質的原因，宋焰和許沁漸漸有了交集。宋焰帶領十里台的消防員們為維護人民生命財產安全而英勇奮鬥，經歷了無數次血與火的生死考驗後仍不改初心。他的堅持感染著許沁，困擾他們多年的心結也漸漸被解開。兩人克服家庭阻力，最後重新走到一起，互相鼓勵，共同進步，用各自的專長守護著這座美麗的城市。

programme.title: E18
programme.desc: 失意的女拳手劉鹽隻身踏上異國尋母之路，憑藉著拼命想要「贏一次」的野蠻生命力，在男主角盧天馳的支持與守護下，在拳擊與美食這兩個領域都闖出自己的天地，完成了人生的逆襲。

programme.title: E47
programme.desc: 《長安十二時辰》改編自馬伯庸的同名小説，講述了唐朝上元節前夕，長安城陷入危局，長安死囚張小敬臨危受命，與李必攜手在十二時辰內拯救長安的故事。

programme.title: E42
programme.desc: 浩瀚的九州大地上，大徵朝珠賦沉重，逼得漁民絞殺親子，以謀鮫女落淚而得鮫珠，沿海漁村的少女海市（楊冪飾）因此遭遇，父母亡故，全村被屠戮。生死關頭，她求助於途經此地的大徵第一權臣方諸（陳偉霆飾演），歷經考驗，最終被方諸帶回天啟。海市從此女扮男裝，成為方諸的徒弟。此時，大徵內憂外患不斷，喜怒不定的年輕皇帝褚仲旭（徐開騁飾），因為經受皇朝內亂，而對生失去了一切興趣，表面上以昏君自居，卻在方諸苦苦支撐國家和平時，暗中默默觀望這一切。

programme.title: E31
programme.desc: 消防局長宋焰（楊洋飾）和急診科醫生許沁（王楚然飾）分別十年之後重逢，青春時代的兩人因家庭反對被迫分開，再相見時，兩人都有了許多成長和改變。由於工作性質的原因，宋焰和許沁漸漸有了交集。宋焰帶領十里台的消防員們為維護人民生命財產安全而英勇奮鬥，經歷了無數次血與火的生死考驗後仍不改初心。他的堅持感染著許沁，困擾他們多年的心結也漸漸被解開。兩人克服家庭阻力，最後重新走到一起，互相鼓勵，共同進步，用各自的專長守護著這座美麗的城市。

programme.title: E47
programme.desc: 《長安十二時辰》改編自馬伯庸的同名小説，講述了唐朝上元節前夕，長安城陷入危局，長安死囚張小敬臨危受命，與李必攜手在十二時辰內拯救長安的故事。

programme.title: E42
programme.desc: 浩瀚的九州大地上，大徵朝珠賦沉重，逼得漁民絞殺親子，以謀鮫女落淚而得鮫珠，沿海漁村的少女海市（楊冪飾）因此遭遇，父母亡故，全村被屠戮。生死關頭，她求助於途經此地的大徵第一權臣方諸（陳偉霆飾演），歷經考驗，最終被方諸帶回天啟。海市從此女扮男裝，成為方諸的徒弟。此時，大徵內憂外患不斷，喜怒不定的年輕皇帝褚仲旭（徐開騁飾），因為經受皇朝內亂，而對生失去了一切興趣，表面上以昏君自居，卻在方諸苦苦支撐國家和平時，暗中默默觀望這一切。

programme.desc: 消防局長宋焰（楊洋飾）和急診科醫生許沁（王楚然飾）分別十年之後重逢，青春時代的兩人因家庭反對被迫分開，再相見時，兩人都有了許多成長和改變。由於工作性質的原因，宋焰和許沁漸漸有了交集。宋焰帶領十里台的消防員們為維護人民生命財產安全而英勇奮鬥，經歷了無數次血與火的生死考驗後仍不改初心。他的堅持感染著許沁，困擾他們多年的心結也漸漸被解開。兩人克服家庭阻力，最後重新走到一起，互相鼓勵，共同進步，用各自的專長守護著這座美麗的城市。

programme.title: E18
programme.desc: 失意的女拳手劉鹽隻身踏上異國尋母之路，憑藉著拼命想要「贏一次」的野蠻生命力，在男主角盧天馳的支持與守護下，在拳擊與美食這兩個領域都闖出自己的天地，完成了人生的逆襲。

E12 - Siblings Month: Sharing is Caring!
programme.desc: JJ is learning that sharing is caring during Siblings Month! First, JJ, YoYo & TomTom show how much fun it is to share snacks & toys while playing at the park & at home. Then, the siblings team up for a game of baseball with animal friends, & TomTom & YoYo help JJ make a home run! The caring continues as they help find their lost dog Bingo, make rainbow popsicles together & build a gratitude family tree with photos.

programme.title: E1 - Solving the Biggest Mysteries!
programme.desc: Mila & Morphle are on the case, solving the biggest mysteries in town! When Aunt Augustine's new necklace is stolen, Detective Mila & Morphle find clues to track down the culprits. Then, Winston & the Bandits steal a time machine & use it to go to the future! Mila & Morphle must follow them to get it back. The mysteries continue as the Bandits steal Morphle & the friends must find him, & a body swap device causes a confusing mix-up!

programme.title: E2 - A Big Test of Skill & Teamwork!
programme.desc: Gecko & the Mechanicals face a big test of skill & teamwork! First, the Mechs are in Garage School when a real emergency comes in. In a role reversal, they must fix Fiona the Firetruck's starter motor while Gecko instructs them! Then, when Blue crashes during a flying race, Gecko must show his skill to repair him. The day ends with a big American football game where Gecko comes up with a clever strategy & a creative fix to help his team win!

programme.title: E2 - When Friends Need a Hero!
programme.desc: Sometimes friends need a hero, & Buster is always ready to help! When he gets caught in a scary storm, he rushes to shelter, but then he spots his friend Scout, stuck in a muddy puddle! Buster has to muster all his courage to go back out & rescue her. But sometimes, even heroes need help! On another day, Buster gets stuck in the mud himself & has to be towed out by Terry Tractor. From stopping a runaway train to standing up to a bully, Buster is always there for his friends.

programme.title: E1 - JJ's Yummy Food & Clean-Up Fun!
programme.desc: It's a day of yummy food & clean-up fun with JJ! First, learn about all types of pasta & make some from scratch in Grandma's kitchen. Then, Cody's Dad shows how fun & tasty healthy eating can be with delicious sliced fruit. After all the fun, it's time to clean up! JJ's family gives Bingo a scrub in the tub after he gets dirty playing outside, & all the kids chip in to wash a filthy firetruck. It's fun to make a mess, & even more fun to clean up!

programme.title: E5 - Super Creative Day of Play
programme.desc: Get ready for a super creative day of play with Twinkle! First, it's time to get musical! Each toadstool makes a different musical note, allowing Twinkle & Sandy the Seagull to create a musical tune. Then, get creative as Twinkle has fun painting a picture of what she sees. The fun continues as Twinkle shares a box full of super fun toys, & her friends learn how to play new musical instruments!

programme.title: E2 - A Big Test of Skill & Teamwork!
programme.desc: Gecko & the Mechanicals face a big test of skill & teamwork! First, the Mechs are in Garage School when a real emergency comes in. In a role reversal, they must fix Fiona the Firetruck's starter motor while Gecko instructs them! Then, when Blue crashes during a flying race, Gecko must show his skill to repair him. The day ends with a big American football game where Gecko comes up with a clever strategy & a creative fix to help his team win!

programme.title: E2 - A Busy Day at the Garage!
programme.desc: It's always a busy day at Gecko's Garage! The fun starts when Fiona the Fire Truck arrives with a broken hose that needs a clever fix. Then, Baby Truck comes in after playing in muddy puddles & needs a trip through the car wash machine. The day gets even busier with a late-night emergency wheel change for Bobby, which Gecko must do without waking up the sleeping Mechanicals! Plus, the Mechs have to work as a team when Gecko is feeling unwell.

programme.title: E1 - From Dinosaurs To Pet Knights!
programme.desc: Blippi is on an adventure from dinosaurs to pet knights! He travels back in time with Tabbs to help a little Microraptor prove that being small has its benefits when they rescue a giant sauropod from the mud. Then, they head to the African savannah to learn how to roar, sneak & pounce like a lion! Back at the clubhouse, Blippi learns how to interpret a puppy's tail wags & even travels back in time again to help a real-life knight in shining armor—who happens to be a corgi!

programme.title: E2 - Sweet Dreams & Goodnight Songs!
programme.desc: Get ready for sweet dreams & goodnight songs! First, Mia giggles with delight as she gathers four of her favorite stuffed animals into bed with her for a fun game of 'Ten in the Bed.' The bedtime fun continues as Maple & Muffin play a game of 'Five Little Monkeys' during their bubble bath. Then, Grandma Panda helps Mia & Bari embark on a fantastic adventure, building a little rocket out of cushions to go on an adventure to the moon!

programme.title: E2 - A Big Test of Skill & Teamwork!
programme.desc: Gecko & the Mechanicals face a big test of skill & teamwork! First, the Mechs are in Garage School when a real emergency comes in. In a role reversal, they must fix Fiona the Firetruck's starter motor while Gecko instructs them! Then, when Blue crashes during a flying race, Gecko must show his skill to repair him. The day ends with a big American football game where Gecko comes up with a clever strategy & a creative fix to help his team win!

programme.title: E2 - A Busy Day at the Garage!
programme.desc: It's always a busy day at Gecko's Garage! The fun starts when Fiona the Fire Truck arrives with a broken hose that needs a clever fix. Then, Baby Truck comes in after playing in muddy puddles & needs a trip through the car wash machine. The day gets even busier with a late-night emergency wheel change for Bobby, which Gecko must do without waking up the sleeping Mechanicals! Plus, the Mechs have to work as a team when Gecko is feeling unwell.

programme.title: E12 - Siblings Month: Sharing is Caring!
programme.desc: JJ is learning that sharing is caring during Siblings Month! First, JJ, YoYo & TomTom show how much fun it is to share snacks & toys while playing at the park & at home. Then, the siblings team up for a game of baseball with animal friends, & TomTom & YoYo help JJ make a home run! The caring continues as they help find their lost dog Bingo, make rainbow popsicles together & build a gratitude family tree with photos.

programme.title: E1 - Solving the Biggest Mysteries!
programme.desc: Mila & Morphle are on the case, solving the biggest mysteries in town! When Aunt Augustine's new necklace is stolen, Detective Mila & Morphle find clues to track down the culprits. Then, Winston & the Bandits steal a time machine & use it to go to the future! Mila & Morphle must follow them to get it back. The mysteries continue as the Bandits steal Morphle & the friends must find him, & a body swap device causes a confusing mix-up!

programme.title: E2 - Sweet Dreams & Goodnight Songs!
programme.desc: Get ready for sweet dreams & goodnight songs! First, Mia giggles with delight as she gathers four of her favorite stuffed animals into bed with her for a fun game of 'Ten in the Bed.' The bedtime fun continues as Maple & Muffin play a game of 'Five Little Monkeys' during their bubble bath. Then, Grandma Panda helps Mia & Bari embark on a fantastic adventure, building a little rocket out of cushions to go on an adventure to the moon!

programme.title: E1 - Solving the Biggest Mysteries!

programme.title: E2 - A Big Test of Skill & Teamwork!
programme.desc: Gecko & the Mechanicals face a big test of skill & teamwork! First, the Mechs are in Garage School when a real emergency comes in. In a role reversal, they must fix Fiona the Firetruck's starter motor while Gecko instructs them! Then, when Blue crashes during a flying race, Gecko must show his skill to repair him. The day ends with a big American football game where Gecko comes up with a clever strategy & a creative fix to help his team win!

programme.title: E2 - A Busy Day at the Garage!
programme.desc: It's always a busy day at Gecko's Garage! The fun starts when Fiona the Fire Truck arrives with a broken hose that needs a clever fix. Then, Baby Truck comes in after playing in muddy puddles & needs a trip through the car wash machine. The day gets even busier with a late-night emergency wheel change for Bobby, which Gecko must do without waking up the sleeping Mechanicals! Plus, the Mechs have to work as a team when Gecko is feeling unwell.

programme.title: E12 - Siblings Month: Sharing is Caring!
programme.desc: JJ is learning that sharing is caring during Siblings Month! First, JJ, YoYo & TomTom show how much fun it is to share snacks & toys while playing at the park & at home. programme.title: E2 - Sweet Dreams & Goodnight Songs!

programme.title: E2 - When Friends Need a Hero!
programme.desc: Sometimes friends need a hero, & Buster is always ready to help! When he gets caught in a scary storm, he rushes to shelter, but then he spots his friend Scout, stuck in a muddy puddle! Buster has to muster all his courage to go back out & rescue her. But sometimes, even heroes need help! On another day, Buster gets stuck in the mud himself & has to be towed out by Terry Tractor. From stopping a runaway train to standing up to a bully, Buster is always there for his friends.

programme.title: Top Chef S17E13 -Parma
programme.desc: In the penultimate episode in the All Stars competition, the chefs are treated to a culinary dream trip to Parma, the legendary home of Parmigiano-Reggiano cheese and Prosciutto di Parma ham. After getting a behind the scenes tour of some traditional multi-generational factories of these exclusive products, the chefs must feature these ingredients in two courses and serve their dishes to a table of 16 Michelin stars. Pasta master, Chef Evan Funke, sits in as the guest judge along with Tom, Padma, Gail and a bevy of celebrated Italian super-star chefs. One chef is eliminated as only the top three will move on to the finale.

programme.title: Testing Team Doki
programme.desc: Oto's proud of his driving skills, so when his RC car goes haywire in the middle of a race, he's sure it's the car's fault! Why did only Oto's car break? They set off to a toy design lab, hoping to solve the mystery of what went wrong with that one car!

programme.title: Fossil Finds
programme.desc: Eric learns that fossils are like fingerprints left behind by prehistoric plants or animals. He makes some modern-day fossils using toy dinosaurs and flour.

programme.title: Seal
programme.desc: Grandad Badger tells Binah an epic tale about the time he chased a seal around the world. Red challenges Grey to keep quiet for an entire episode. And Fiona Fox finally gets a moment of peace as Orla and Meabh rest calmly in her arms.

programme.title: Melissa Millett: Amazing Pets
programme.desc: Melissa trained her dog and cat to become a record-breaking duo. She shares with Alan Pixsley the fundamentals of animal training and what it takes to become the very best. But what will be the one thing that Alan can learn from Melissa and his new furry friends?

programme.title: Veranica Tchalabaeva: Winning Poodle Squad
programme.desc: The GUINNESS WORLD RECORDS title for the most times a dog passes through a roller pushed by a dog in one minute is held by Veranica Tchalabaeva and her dogs. Veranica shares the basics of dog training and what it takes to become the best in the world.

programme.title: Fossil Finds
programme.desc: Eric learns that fossils are like fingerprints left behind by prehistoric plants or animals. He makes some modern-day fossils using toy dinosaurs and flour.

programme.title: Bouncing Back
programme.desc: For the first time ever, the Acrobatic Men's Four are invited to trials for the World Championships - but when it comes to costumes for the day, they realise their performance on the floor is not their only concern!

programme.title: Another Busy Day
programme.desc: The Junior Vets are removing a big lump from a dog's spleen, helping a cow give birth, and chasing down super-speedy birds at a theme park.

programme.title: Eric Makes Wind
programme.desc: Eric learns that an anemometer – an instrument to measure wind speed – is important for sailors and for pilots. Then he learns how to make one himself.

programme.title: Fossil Finds
programme.desc: Eric learns that fossils are like fingerprints left behind by prehistoric plants or animals. He makes some modern-day fossils using toy dinosaurs and flour.

programme.title: The Big Decision
programme.desc: Ice dancer Adriano has finally chosen his new dance partner, so it's time to tell Chloe and Ella who he's picked. And speed skater Maddie loves going fast, but a mysterious illness has affected her training. She has a new plan which she hopes will help her recover.

programme.title: Trip to Thailand
programme.desc: Zoe and Milo are playing ping-pong when Alim arrives and they offer him a pink racket. But is pink for girls only? Alim takes them to Thailand, where they meet a boy in a pink shirt and learn that in Thailand, colors of clothing match the days of the week, not gender!

programme.title: Trip to Jordan
programme.desc: Zoe and Milo clash over their school show poster-Zoe colors while Milo writes the title. Alim suggests writing from the right, surprising them. In Jordan, they meet Souria preparing a puppet show and learn to write Arabic... from right to left!

programme.title: The Mystery of Alex's Weak Kick
programme.desc: Addison has to figure out why Alex can't kick a soccer ball nearly as well as he used to, in order to correct his game in time for him to pass the team tryouts. Alex thinks he's jinxed, but Donnie has a vested interest in making sure Alex doesn't make the team.

programme.title: Orca Baby
programme.desc: Morgan, the deaf orca, is about to give birth to her very first calf. The stakes are high, and the staff at Loro Parque are holding their collective breath as the scene is set for the greatest natural phenomenon in the zoo's history.

programme.title: Big Boom
programme.desc: Boom has devised his biggest plan so far. To stop Boom, it requires not only a superhero but also friends and enemies to come together to save Bhilka.

programme.title: Groundwater
programme.desc: The birthday surprise traps Kit and Mr. Battery in a cave.

programme.title: Trip to Japan
programme.desc: Alim finds Zoe and Milo in a messy pancake-making scene. They laugh when asked if school teaches cleaning. Alim takes them to Japan, where Akiko shows that students not only study but also take turns cleaning and helping in the canteen.

programme.title: Groundwater
programme.desc: The birthday surprise traps Kit and Mr. Battery in a cave.

programme.title: A Tornado in a Bottle
programme.desc: Eric pretends to be a tornado. He finds out they happen when the wind starts rotating really fast in a vortex – a whirlpool shape. Then he learns how to make a tornado using recycled plastic bottles.

programme.title: It's Snow Time!
programme.desc: Figure skaters Josh, Kloe, and Beccy pack their bags and head to Latvia for an important international competition. But it's not all snowball fights and fun. Josh is moving into the senior category and has decided to attempt a new jump.

E2 - Superpowers
programme.desc: Look at the supercharged abilities that give some animals an edge in life. Discover fireflies’ flirty flashes, the tarsier’s incredible night vision, the mantis shrimp’s knockout punch, and the saltwater croc’s prey-detecting pressure sensors.

programme.title: E1 - The Woodland Troop
programme.desc: In this small patch of woodland, two young monkeys face the toughest time of their lives. As they find their place in the world, they must learn which neighbors are allies, and which are foes. Who to trust, and who to avoid. They will suffer loss, and gain friends, as they discover what it means to be part of the Woodland Troop.

programme.title: E3 - Africa
programme.desc: Observe the eternal search for water that defines the lives of Africa’s wild animals. Witness the biggest marine feeding frenzy on Earth, see how cobras stock up on solar power, and join wildebeest herds and elephant clans on their epic migrations.

programme.title: E5 - A Bear’s Thanksgiving
programme.desc: Spy on the summer cubs as they learn to climb trees and forage for food in preparation for their release into the wild. Get surprised by a set of new arrivals, observe the annual pre-hibernation eating binge, and enjoy a bear-friendly Thanksgiving.

programme.title: E6 - Goodbye Campers
programme.desc: Prepare for the summer cubs’ release with Roger, then meet Ace and Little Blueberry, two newbies with serious health issues who will have to stay over the winter with the Z cubs. Later, celebrate as six healthy, happy bears embark on their new life.

programme.title: E2 - Better Together
programme.desc: The wilds of Zambia are a tough place to live. Here, many animals must come together in groups to help defend territory, protect offspring, find food and overcome predators.

As they find their place in the world, they must learn which neighbors are allies, and which are foes. Who to trust, and who to avoid. They will suffer loss, and gain friends, as they discover what it means to be part of the Woodland Troop.

programme.title: E2 - Better Together
programme.desc: The wilds of Zambia are a tough place to live. Here, many animals must come together in groups to help defend territory, protect offspring, find food and overcome predators.

programme.title: E2 - Superpowers
programme.desc: Look at the supercharged abilities that give some animals an edge in life. Discover fireflies’ flirty flashes, the tarsier’s incredible night vision, the mantis shrimp’s knockout punch, and the saltwater croc’s prey-detecting pressure sensors.

programme.title: E1 - The Woodland Troop
programme.desc: In this small patch of woodland, two young monkeys face the toughest time of their lives. They will suffer loss, and gain friends, as they discover what it means to be part of the Woodland Troop.

programme.title: E3 - Africa
programme.desc: Observe the eternal search for water that defines the lives of Africa’s wild animals. Witness the biggest marine feeding frenzy on Earth, see how cobras stock up on solar power, and join wildebeest herds and elephant clans on their epic migrations.

programme.title: E5 - A Bear’s Thanksgiving
programme.desc: Spy on the summer cubs as they learn to climb trees and forage for food in preparation for their release into the wild. Get surprised by a set of new arrivals, observe the annual pre-hibernation eating binge, and enjoy a bear-friendly Thanksgiving.

programme.title: E6 - Goodbye Campers
programme.desc: Prepare for the summer cubs’ release with Roger, then meet Ace and Little Blueberry, two newbies with serious health issues who will have to stay over the winter with the Z cubs. Later, celebrate as six healthy, happy bears embark on their new life.

programme.title: E1 - Chernobyl's Deadly Secrets
programme.desc: Go inside the abandoned city of Chernobyl to follow an investigation into the truth behind the nuclear meltdown there over 30 years ago.

programme.desc: How do they design and produce the ultimate kingpin bowling ball?

programme.title: E8 - Sumerian Pyramid Of Death
programme.desc: Deep in the Iraqi desert, the world's only ziggurat towers over the remains of the first civilization ever known in human history.

programme.title: E10 - Mighty Planes
programme.desc: World's Top 5 shines the spotlight on the world's greatest mechanical marvels and pits them against each other to establish the very best of the best.

programme.title: E2 - Attack Of The Cell Foes
programme.desc: Mark and the team target rude phone zombies with pranks that exact payback on loud mobile phone talkers and inattentive text walkers.

programme.title: E2 - Huge Hulls
programme.desc: The XLE4, soon to be the biggest jack-up rig on Earth, will stand on record breaking 200 metre long legs, and will be assembled from 11 gigantic blocks.
